specific_question: How many key environmental compliance metrics will Elexion Automotive collect from each of its production lines using IoT sensors and digital twins in Q1 2026?
answer: Internal Elexion Automotive analytics projections indicate that each production line will collect approximately 500 real-time environmental compliance metrics from IoT sensors and digital twins between January 1 and March 31, 2026. This will cover emissions, energy use, and waste management.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
